metadata.description: Challenges validating Compose Multiplatform UI, themes, animations, and accessibility

challenges.name: Light Theme Rendering
challenges.description: Verify light theme applies correct colors, typography, and spacing across all components

assertions.message: No color issues in light theme

challenges.name: Dark Theme Rendering
challenges.description: Verify dark theme applies correct colors with sufficient contrast ratios

assertions.message: No contrast issues in dark theme

challenges.name: StyleSheet Light/Dark Consistency
challenges.description: Verify CSS stylesheets for all themed formats (RST, OrgMode, AsciiDoc, LaTeX) have both light and dark variants with matching structure

outputs.name: missing_rules
outputs.description: CSS rules present in light but missing in dark or vice versa

assertions.message: Light and dark stylesheets must have matching CSS rules

challenges.name: Animation Timing Constants
challenges.description: Verify AnimationTiming constants are within acceptable ranges for smooth 60fps rendering

outputs.name: timing_valid
outputs.description: Whether all timings are within range

assertions.message: All animation timings must be within valid ranges

challenges.name: Accessibility Content Descriptions
challenges.description: Verify all interactive UI elements have content descriptions for screen readers

assertions.message: All interactive elements must have content descriptions

challenges.name: WCAG Color Contrast Compliance
challenges.description: Verify text color contrast ratios meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)

assertions.message: All text must meet WCAG AA contrast ratios
